changes.value:
Panics at swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/state.rs:155:29
"there is no reactor running, must be called from the context of a Tokio 1.x runtime"

Test needs #[tokio::test] attribute or a Tokio runtime handle.
